title: SQL Query Processing Flow for Complex Retrieval
description: A flowchart illustrating the logical steps and components involved in executing a complex SQL SELECT query in a DBMS, from parsing to result retrieval.
relationships: Parser validates syntax and creates a query tree
Optimizer analyzes the tree and generates an efficient execution plan
Executor runs the plan by interacting with the Storage Engine
Storage Engine accesses and returns the actual data
Final result set is formatted and returned to the user
